# Cross-Service Data Flow Edges — Stage 09

Shopify CLI is not a deployed microservice system, but it does contain local process/browser/server boundaries that single-codebase taint does not follow directly: browser dev-console clients, H3 local dev servers, WebSocket channels, a reverse proxy to user app processes, and platform HTTP clients.

## Edge Inventory

| ID | Channel | Producer | Consumer | Data shape | Boundary sanitization | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| E001 | websocket | ui-extensions-dev-console `packages/ui-extensions-dev-console/src/App.tsx:16` | app-extension-dev-server `packages/app/src/cli/services/dev/extension/websocket/handlers.ts:19` | WebSocket JSON messages {event: update|dispatch|log, data: ...} sent by the dev console or any browser/tunnel client that can reach /extensions. | URL equality only; no Origin/key/session check. Update messages check app.apiKey only when an app object is present; extension-only updates are accepted. | already-covered-by-existing-drafts |
| E002 | websocket | app-extension-dev-server `packages/app/src/cli/services/dev/extension/websocket/handlers.ts:36` | ui-extensions-server-kit-client `packages/ui-extensions-server-kit/src/ExtensionServerClient/ExtensionServerClient.ts:163` | Connected/update/dispatch JSON carrying app metadata, store FQDN, extension payloads, asset URLs, and localization blobs. | client catches JSON parse failures and filters by surface; no schema validation or URL allowlist is applied in the browser client. Server payload source is local app config/build output plus updates from E001. | edge-recorded-no-new-draft |
| E003 | http | graphiql-browser-client `packages/app/src/cli/services/dev/graphiql/templates/graphiql.tsx:251` | app-graphiql-dev-server `packages/app/src/cli/services/dev/graphiql/server.ts:233` | Browser-provided GraphQL JSON body, custom headers, and api_version query; status polling requests. | GraphQL POST/UI routes check the per-run key before proxying; /graphiql/status is not key-gated. api_version is passed to adminUrl without an observed allowlist at this boundary. | already-covered-by-existing-drafts |
| E004 | http-external | app-graphiql-dev-server `packages/app/src/cli/services/dev/graphiql/server.ts:261` | shopify-platform `external:0` | Token-bearing OAuth and Admin GraphQL requests derived from local dev session plus browser GraphiQL body. | Bearer/Admin access token added by GraphiQL server; custom request headers filtered by filterCustomHeaders; destination host fixed to storeFqdn/adminUrl. | external-platform-excluded-from-p9-drafting |
| E005 | http-proxy | app-reverse-proxy `packages/app/src/cli/utilities/app/http-reverse-proxy.ts:73` | external-user-app `out-of-repo:0` | Raw HTTP request method/path/body/headers and WebSocket upgrades from browser/tunnel visitors, forwarded to localhost user app ports. | path-prefix routing only; targets are generated as localhost ports for app web/extension processes in setup-dev-processes.ts. Unmatched HTTP returns 500; unmatched WS is destroyed. | coverage-gap-out-of-repo-consumer |
| E006 | http | app-webhook-trigger `packages/app/src/cli/services/webhook/trigger-local-webhook.ts:20` | external-user-app `out-of-repo:0` | POST JSON webhook sample body and JSON-parsed headers returned by Shopify sendSampleWebhook for localhost delivery. | address/method compatibility is validated by trigger-flags.ts; headers are parsed with JSON.parse and forwarded. Local receiver validation is out of repo. | coverage-gap-out-of-repo-consumer |
| E007 | http-external | theme-dev-server `packages/theme/src/cli/utilities/theme-environment/proxy.ts:337` | shopify-platform `external:0` | Theme-dev browser request path/query/body/headers forwarded to fixed Shopify storeFqdn or cdn.shopify.com with theme dev cookies/token. | destination host is fixed to ctx.session.storeFqdn or cdn.shopify.com and hostname mismatch is rejected; hop-by-hop/CORS headers stripped; Authorization only added for theme-dev context. | external-platform-excluded-from-p9-drafting |

## Coverage Gaps / Exclusions

- **Out-of-repo user app receivers/handlers are dynamic and not analyzable in this repository.** Locations: packages/app/src/cli/utilities/app/http-reverse-proxy.ts:73, packages/app/src/cli/services/webhook/trigger-local-webhook.ts:20.
- **External Shopify platform/Admin/CDN consumers are outside P9 drafting scope unless reflected back into in-repo services.** Locations: packages/app/src/cli/services/dev/graphiql/server.ts:261, packages/theme/src/cli/utilities/theme-environment/proxy.ts:337.
- **No in-repo gRPC/proto services, Kafka/SQS/Rabbit/NATS/Redis queues, Celery/Bull workers, or shared application database topology were found. Pub/Sub strings are webhook address validation only, not in-repo publishers/consumers.** Locations: packages/app/src/cli/services/webhook/trigger-flags.ts:13, packages/app/src/cli/models/extensions/specifications/validation/common.ts:5.
- **Local credential/session files are shared by CLI packages but are not independent service/database write-driven flows; they remain covered by earlier token/storage phases.** Locations: packages/cli-kit/src/private/node/session/store.ts.

## Drafting Outcome

No new `p9-*` drafts were filed. The only validated attacker-controlled cross-boundary issue in the in-repo services is the unauthenticated UI extension WebSocket/control channel, already drafted as `p5-001` and deep-probed as `p8-001`. GraphiQL status/API-version issues are already represented by P4/P5 drafts. Out-of-repo user-app receivers and external Shopify platform edges were recorded for coverage but excluded from new P9 findings.
